for d in 07 08 09 10; do
  f="articles/2026/02/$d/articles.jsonl"
  [ -f "$f" ] || continue
  grep -ohiE "(pakistan|india|west indies|england|sri lanka|australia)[^.]{0,50}(beat|won|defeat|loss|lose|fall|crash)[^.]*" "$f" 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "t20|world cup" | head -4
done
echo "=== titles ==="
for d in 09 10; do
  f="articles/2026/02/$d/articles.jsonl"
  [ -f "$f" ] && grep -ohE '"title":"[^"]*"' "$f" 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "t20|world cup|pakistan|india" | head -6
done
